biological_replicate: high and reproducible protein recovery from both Escherichia coli cell (59 ± 3%) and human HepG2 cell (86 ± 5%) samples
technical_replicate: We performed CZE-MS/MS analysis of two batches of the E. coli sample prepared by the MU method.
experimental_design: comparison of MU, CMP, and SP3 methods
compared membrane ultrafiltration (MU), chloroform-methanol precipitation (CMP), and single-spot solid-phase sample preparation using magnetic beads (SP3)
factor_value: SDS concentration (1% w/v), NH4HCO3 (100 mM, pH 8.0)
100 μg of proteins dissolved in 1% (w/v) SDS was used as the starting material.
